summary: httpOnly cookie authentication migration testing complete. All security features verified: login sets httpOnly/Secure/SameSite=lax cookie, /auth/me works with cookie, logout clears cookie, protected routes redirect unauthenticated users, Bearer token fallback works, AuthGateOverlay displays for unauthenticated users on procedure pages.

minor.issue: Returns 500 due to Pydantic validation error (ArticleAdminOut) - pre-existing issue, not related to cookie migration

critical_code_review_comments: Cookie auth migration implemented correctly with httpOnly=True, secure=True, samesite=lax
Backend middleware correctly reads cookie first, then falls back to Bearer header
Frontend api.js uses withCredentials:true for automatic cookie sending
AuthContext uses isAuthenticated boolean instead of token string
WebSocket context uses cookie for auth (same-origin cookies sent automatically)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cookie auth migration verified working. Key test flows: 1) Login at /connexion sets httpOnly cookie, redirects to /admin. 2) Session persists - /admin/database accessible with cookie auth. 3) Logout from homepage dropdown clears cookie, shows success toast. 4) After logout, /admin/database redirects to /connexion. 5) AuthGateOverlay shows on procedure detail pages for unauthenticated users. Note: /api/admin/articles has pre-existing 500 error (Pydantic validation) unrelated to cookie migration.

verified: All database tabs load data (Users, Articles, Properties)
Cookie-based auth works for API calls
Protected routes redirect to /connexion after logout
Unauthenticated users redirected to /connexion when accessing /admin/database
AuthGateOverlay displays on procedure detail pages for unauthenticated users
Has SE CONNECTER and CREER UN COMPTE buttons
